title: pseudolysimachion incanum
intro: Pseudolysimachion incanum, also known as the lesser meadow rue or alpine meadow rue, is a flowering plant species native to the mountainous regions of Europe and Asia. Traditionally, this plant has been used for its medicinal properties, particularly in treating respiratory issues such as bronchitis, coughs, and colds, due to its expectorant and anti-inflammatory properties. The health benefits of Pseudolysimachion incanum include its ability to relieve congestion, reduce fever, and soothe irritated respiratory tracts. In herbal preparations, the plant is often used to make teas, infusions, and tinctures, which can be consumed to reap its medicinal benefits.
